name: Easy Hot Dog Cheese Roll Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Unroll the roll dough and cut each triangle in half, keeping the triangular shape. Use part of the second package if needed.
2. Wrap 1/3 or a piece of cheese around the frank.
3. Hold the frank with your fingers and start rolling it into the roll, beginning at the larger end of the triangle and rolling towards the tip.
4. Bake in a hot oven until browned. At 400 degrees Fahrenheit, this should take about 10 minutes.
5. Remove when they are browned and serve immediately.
